message.content: Main guides directory for quick thread access and persistent resources.

embeds.title: Guides Directory
embeds.description:
## Featured Thread Guides

- [PLAY SWITCH GAMES](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1102946725431345222) — Play Mario Kart and other Switch titles with friends on PC.
- [PLAY PS3 GAMES](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1102946464893780029) — Skate 3 and other PS3 games on PC.
- [PLAY MODDED ROUNDS](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1271075945947598869) — Revert ROUNDS and use Thunderstore mods.
- [SIDELOAD ON IOS 18+](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1206485025441325086) — Install premium apps and tweaks on iOS 18+.
- [MAKE YOUR OWN MC SERVER](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1095876056231190609) — Host Minecraft servers and learn setup options.
- [PLAY SKATE 3 ONLINE](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1409579838133637250) — Emulate Skate 3 with RPCS3 and play online.
- [GTA V MODDING](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1420920577727924176) — Undetected free mod menu guide.
- [CALCULATOR MOD](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1431717085322678412) — Install calculator mods and related tools.

## External Resources

- [EMULATOR / ROM ARCHIVE](https://vimm.net/vault) — Trusted archive for retro emulators and ROMs.

## Extra Guide Links

- [LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight [CRACKED]](https://canary.discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1511316991561170974)
- [Gamble with UNLIMITED Friends Mod Install Guide](https://discord.com/channels/976680631012589610/1512185857724121338)

> This file is the main directory for the guides channel. Use it as the central reference for all top-thread resources.
